abilities.name: Delta Supply
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may attach a basic Energy card or a δ Rainbow Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon that has δ on its card. This power can't be used if Flygon is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

tests.name: delta_supply_attach_basic_energy
tests.description: Test that Delta Supply can attach basic Energy to delta Pokemon

tests.name: delta_supply_attach_delta_rainbow
tests.description: Test that Delta Supply can attach δ Rainbow Energy

tests.name: delta_supply_only_targets_delta
tests.description: Test that Delta Supply only allows delta Pokemon as targets

tests.name: delta_supply_blocked_by_special_condition
tests.description: Test that Delta Supply is blocked by Special Condition

tests.name: swift_ignores_modifiers
tests.description: Test that Swift ignores Weakness, Resistance, and effects
